browser.name: Browser
browser.description: Web browsing capabilities to fetch real-time information from the internet, including web pages, APIs, and other online resources.

deepwiki.name: DeepWiki
deepwiki.description: DeepWiki provides up-to-date documentation you can talk to, for every repo in the world. Think Deep Research for GitHub - powered by Devin.

github.name: GitHub
github.description: Inspect and manage GitHub repositories, issues, pull requests, branches, commits, and code review workflows.

grep-app.name: Grep.app
grep-app.description: Grep.app provides powerful code search capabilities across a vast index of open source repositories, allowing you to quickly find relevant code snippets and examples.

stealth-browser.name: Stealth Browser
stealth-browser.description: A stealth web browser that can evade anti-bot measures and access content that may be restricted to regular automated browsers.
